description: Brief-first contract definition for modular lesson runtime article/support/video production readiness

tasks.title: Run Gemini contract options inventory
tasks.notes: Read-only. Gemini should list options, risks, and evidence, not decide final contract.

tasks.title: Review inventory and choose recommended contract boundaries
tasks.notes: Codex/user review step. Decide article/support/video route and fallback boundaries.

tasks.title: Draft implementation task split after brief approval
tasks.notes: No implementation until the brief is accepted.

tasks.title: Define smoke-test matrix for production exposure
tasks.notes: Article, support, video, fail-soft, and route exposure gates.
